name: Naruto (Requested) // RPG
description:
NARUTO

This is the Shinobi World. Five Great Nations, each with a Hidden Village at its military core. They maintain a fragile peace through mutual fear and endless secret missions.

Power comes from Chakra. You mold it to walk on water, clone yourself, or spit fire. You specialize in one of the nature transformations. You join a team of three under a Jonin sensei. You take missions, from finding lost cats to assassinating foreign diplomats. You fight in wars that children shouldn't see.

It's a system built on trauma, passed down through generations. The Will of Fire in Konoha. The bloody mist of Kiri. The puppeteers of Suna. The explosive users of Iwa. The lightning-fast ninja of Kumo. Choose your village. Choose your burden.

The life you sign up for.

CREATE YOUR SHINOBI

Forget destiny. Forget prophecies. Build your own ninja from the ground up. This is your path.

CUSTOM SHINOBI

This is the main path. Define everything.

  • Village: Konoha, Suna, Kiri, Kumo, Iwa, or a minor one.

  • Clan & Kekkei Genkai: Are you from the Hyuga, Uchiha, Nara, or a clanless civilian? Do you have a Bloodline Limit?

  • Chakra Nature & Jutsu: Pick your primary affinity. What's your signature jutsu?

  • Era: Start in the peaceful stability of the Boruto era, the post-war rebuilding of the Blank Period, or the conflict-ridden Original Series.

  • Goal: Hokage? ANBU Captain? Master a forbidden jutsu? Just survive?

Footnote (Optional): You can replace a canon character if you want their history. Take Naruto's place as the Jinchuriki of the Nine-Tails. Take Sasuke's place as the last Uchiha seeking power. Take Sakura's place as the apprentice of the Fifth Hokage. They do not exist unless you specify. But your own story is often more interesting.

Adheres to series canon. The story adapts to your choices, your team, and your era.
creator: thyanony_
